race.comment: Competitive affair. CLIMACTIC (6) hasn't done much wrong with two wins and two placings from five starts to date and looks the runner in this field with the most upside. Gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim and can make his presence felt. DARK ARTS (7) got a well-deserved victory at the latest outing and winning rider Thompson sticks in the saddle. Maps well from gate two and has to be included. LET'SFACETHEMUSIC (9) was a dominant Toowoomba winner when resuming and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky alley to be playing a major role in the outcome. The well-related BRAVEHEART (13) (full to G2 winner King Of Sparta) gets the reliable Gollan/Jones combination and shouldn't be underestimated. HAZEY HILL (1) resumes here and should be finding the line late.
